title: Lupine Brand Asset (Procedural Hill)
subtitle: Procedurally generated rolling hill of Texas state flowers with dynamic GPU wind sway.

title: Lupine Bluebonnet (Scientific)
subtitle: Lupinus texensis scientific molecular model (.xyz dataset) showing strict atomic arrangement.

subtitle: NIST evaluation of 8 interatomic potentials. Max error: 49.0%. Color by error to see where potentials fail.

Used to validate playback extrapolation logic.

title: FCC Cu Dislocation-GB Tracking
subtitle: Khanh Dang et al. (Sci Data 2025): Dislocation–grain-boundary interactions matrix

metadata.reference: Perfect testbed for GNN Topology Error Mapping to characterize complex GB network transitions.

title: hcp Ti Grand-Canonical GB Optimization
subtitle: Enze Chen et al. (Nat Commun 2024): Automated phase discovery using GRIP

metadata.reference: Requires Phonon Benchmarking (PDOS) to validate the dynamical stability of newly discovered hcp Ti GB phases.

title: Topological GB Segregation Transitions
subtitle: Vivek Devulapalli et al. (Science 2024): SGC MD/MC thermodynamic excess mapping

metadata.reference: Candidate for Multi-Fidelity UQ (glimMER) to correct biases in the calculated segregation thermodynamic excess properties.

title: Cantor Alloy Dislocation Glide
subtitle: W. Curtin et al. (Nature 2023): Edge dislocation mobility in CoCrFeMnNi High-Entropy Alloy using MLIP.

metadata.reference: Deep learning potential reveals cross-slip mechanisms in Cantor alloy.

title: LLZO Solid Electrolyte Ion Dynamics
subtitle: G. Ceder et al. (Nature Materials 2024): Correlated Li-ion diffusion pathways in garnet-type solid electrolytes.

metadata.reference: Analysis of concerted migration events in Li7La3Zr2O12.

title: ZIF-8 Gate-Opening Transition
subtitle: F.X. Coudert et al. (Science 2023): Mechanical flexibility and gas-induced phase transition in Metal-Organic Frameworks.

metadata.method: Classical MD with flexible force field
metadata.reference: Adsorption-induced breathing and swing transitions in ZIF-8.

title: Tungsten Collision Cascade
subtitle: A.E. Sand et al. (PRL 2022): Primary radiation damage and defect clustering in plasma-facing materials.

metadata.reference: 150 keV primary knock-on atom (PKA) cascade evolution over 20 ps.

title: GST Phase-Change Crystallization
subtitle: S.R. Elliott et al. (Nature Comms 2024): Ultrafast nucleation in Ge2Sb2Te5 memory materials.

metadata.reference: Tracking the amorphous-to-cubic phase transition via homonuclear bonds.

title: Buckminsterfullerene
subtitle: C60 Truncated Icosahedron: The iconic carbon allotrope discovered by Kroto, Smalley, and Curl.

title: Graphene Nanoribbon
subtitle: Armchair Graphene Nanoribbon with Hydrogen-passivated edges.

title: Gold Nanocluster
subtitle: Au FCC 3x3x3 Bulk Supercell representing a tiny nanocluster fragment.

title: Ice/Water Cluster
subtitle: A generated cluster of 64 water molecules.

title: Cu₆₄Zr₃₆ Metallic Glass
subtitle: Melt-quench simulation showing glass transition and short-range order

title: Al Polycrystal (Voronoi)
subtitle: Grain boundary structure in FCC aluminum with Σ5 misorientation

title: Titanium HCP Deformation
subtitle: Basal slip and twinning under uniaxial tension

title: Brittle Fracture (2D)
subtitle: Dynamic crack propagation with elastic-plastic zone, single snapshot

title: Cu Edge Dislocation
subtitle: 1/2⟨110⟩ dislocation on (111) plane with stacking fault

title: Nanoindentation Al
subtitle: Spherical indenter penetration with dislocation nucleation

title: High-Entropy Alloy Nanoparticle
subtitle: Multi-element open dataset (Ni-Co-Cr-Fe-Mn) showing composition gradients, single snapshot

title: Carbon Nanotube Tensile Pull
subtitle: Mechanics of a SWCNT structural failure under extreme load

title: SiO₂ Amorphous Silica
subtitle: Vitreous silica with tetrahedral network structure

title: α-Al₂O₃ (Sapphire)
subtitle: Corundum structure with basal plane surface

title: Polyethylene Chain
subtitle: Single C₁₀₀₀H₂₀₀₂ chain with united-atom model

title: TIP4P/2005 Water
subtitle: Equilibrated water box with H-bond network

title: NIST IPR Top-100 Catalog
subtitle: 40 pure elements + 60 binary alloys ranked by LAMMPS-record count. 434 potentials, 626 parameter files.

title: C60 Thermal Breathing (1500 K)
subtitle: Buckminsterfullerene cage in NVT MD: sp2 bond network breathes radially while Stone-Wales-like distortions ripple through the truncated icosahedron.

metadata.reference: Kim & Tomanek, Melting the Fullerenes: A Molecular Dynamics Study, Phys. Rev. Lett. 72, 2418 (1994).

title: Polyethylene Tensile Failure
subtitle: All-atom (CH2)40 chain pulled along its backbone until the central C-C bond ruptures. Per-atom strain peaks at the rupture site moments before bond cleavage.

metadata.reference: Stuart, Tutein, Harrison, A reactive potential for hydrocarbons with intermolecular interactions, J. Chem. Phys. 112, 6472 (2000).

title: Diels-Alder Cycloaddition
subtitle: 1,3-butadiene + ethylene -> cyclohexene. Concerted [4+2]: two pi bonds break, two sigma C-C bonds form across the transition state in a single coordinated motion.

metadata.method: Born-Oppenheimer MD along intrinsic reaction coordinate
metadata.reference: Houk, Lin, Brown, Evidence for the concerted mechanism of the Diels-Alder reaction of butadiene with ethylene, J. Am. Chem. Soc. 108, 554 (1986).

title: Methane Oxidation (ReaxFF)
subtitle: CH4 + 2 O2 -> CO2 + 2 H2O combustion onset. Four C-H and two O=O bonds break while two C=O and four O-H bonds form; partial charges flow with the electrons.

metadata.reference: Chenoweth, van Duin, Goddard III, ReaxFF Reactive Force Field for Molecular Dynamics Simulations of Hydrocarbon Oxidation, J. Phys. Chem. A 112, 1040 (2008).

title: Ice Ih to Liquid Water (TIP4P/Ice)
subtitle: Hexagonal ice melting through the H-bond network: every oxygen starts with 4 tetrahedral neighbours and disorders into ~3.6 in the liquid phase.

metadata.reference: Vega, Sanz, Abascal, The melting temperature of the most common models of water, J. Chem. Phys. 122, 114507 (2005).

title: Aspirin (rMD17, gas-phase DFT)
subtitle: Acetylsalicylic acid in vacuum at 500 K, 100k DFT/PBE+vdW frames at 1 fs. Color by per-atom force magnitude reveals carbonyl wagging, methyl rotation, ester bond breathing.

metadata.method: DFT/PBE+vdW-TS, 1 fs Langevin MD at 500 K
metadata.reference: Christensen & von Lilienfeld, On the role of gradients for ML of molecular energies and forces, MLST 1, 045018 (2020). Original MD17: Chmiela et al., Sci. Adv. 3, e1603015 (2017).

title: Naphthalene (rMD17)
subtitle: Rigid aromatic bicyclic at 500 K. Clean ring-breathing modes; minimal C-H stretch.

metadata.method: DFT/PBE+vdW-TS, 1 fs Langevin MD at 500 K
metadata.reference: Christensen & von Lilienfeld, On the role of gradients for ML of molecular energies and forces, MLST 1, 045018 (2020). Original MD17: Chmiela et al., Sci. Adv. 3, e1603015 (2017).

title: Paracetamol (rMD17)
subtitle: Acetaminophen at 500 K — amide N-H/C=O resonance + phenol O-H rotation captured at 1 fs.

metadata.method: DFT/PBE+vdW-TS, 1 fs Langevin MD at 500 K
metadata.reference: Christensen & von Lilienfeld, On the role of gradients for ML of molecular energies and forces, MLST 1, 045018 (2020). Original MD17: Chmiela et al., Sci. Adv. 3, e1603015 (2017).

title: Uracil (rMD17)
subtitle: Pyrimidine DNA base at 500 K. Twin C=O carbonyls + N-H wag — the smallest 'real' biological molecule in this set.

metadata.method: DFT/PBE+vdW-TS, 1 fs Langevin MD at 500 K
metadata.reference: Christensen & von Lilienfeld, On the role of gradients for ML of molecular energies and forces, MLST 1, 045018 (2020). Original MD17: Chmiela et al., Sci. Adv. 3, e1603015 (2017).

title: Ethanol (rMD17)
subtitle: C2H6O at 500 K — hydroxyl rotation barrier crossings visible across 100k frames.

metadata.method: DFT/PBE+vdW-TS, 1 fs Langevin MD at 500 K
metadata.reference: Christensen & von Lilienfeld, On the role of gradients for ML of molecular energies and forces, MLST 1, 045018 (2020). Original MD17: Chmiela et al., Sci. Adv. 3, e1603015 (2017).

title: Alanine (WS22, Wigner-sampled)
subtitle: Smallest chiral amino acid — backbone phi/psi configurations sampled across the Wigner distribution. Color by Hirshfeld partial charge.

metadata.method: Wigner sampling at 0 K + geometry interpolation, DFT properties
metadata.reference: Pinheiro Jr, Zhang, Dral & Barbatti, WS22 database, Wigner Sampling and geometry interpolation for configurationally diverse molecular datasets, Sci. Data 10, 95 (2023).

title: Thymine (WS22)
subtitle: DNA base T — five-methyl uracil. WS22 Wigner sampling captures vibrational + rotamer diversity at DFT accuracy.

metadata.method: Wigner sampling at 0 K + geometry interpolation, DFT properties
metadata.reference: Pinheiro Jr, Zhang, Dral & Barbatti, WS22 database, Wigner Sampling and geometry interpolation for configurationally diverse molecular datasets, Sci. Data 10, 95 (2023).

title: Urocanic Acid (WS22)
subtitle: Skin UV-photoreceptor (cis/trans isomers regulate immune response). Wigner-sampled DFT geometries with Hirshfeld charges.

metadata.method: Wigner sampling at 0 K + geometry interpolation, DFT properties
metadata.reference: Pinheiro Jr, Zhang, Dral & Barbatti, WS22 database, Wigner Sampling and geometry interpolation for configurationally diverse molecular datasets, Sci. Data 10, 95 (2023).

title: DMABN (WS22)
subtitle: 4-(dimethylamino)benzonitrile — classic TICT-state emitter. Donor-acceptor twisting captured in geometry diversity.

metadata.method: Wigner sampling at 0 K + geometry interpolation, DFT properties
metadata.reference: Pinheiro Jr, Zhang, Dral & Barbatti, WS22 database, Wigner Sampling and geometry interpolation for configurationally diverse molecular datasets, Sci. Data 10, 95 (2023).

title: Azobenzene Photoisomerization (xxMD-DFT)
subtitle: Cis<->trans N=N rotation through conical intersection. Non-adiabatic surface hopping captures actual bond rearrangement, not thermal jiggle.

metadata.method: Non-adiabatic excited-state MD (Tully surface hopping) at DFT (M06)
metadata.potential: DFT M06 with TDDFT excited states
metadata.reference: Pengmei, Shu & Levine, Beyond MD17: the reactive xxMD dataset, Sci. Data 11, 222 (2024).

title: Stilbene Photoisomerization (xxMD-DFT)
subtitle: Photo-driven C=C twisting between cis and trans isomers. The classic phototaxis molecule.

metadata.method: Non-adiabatic excited-state MD (Tully surface hopping) at DFT (M06)
metadata.potential: DFT M06 with TDDFT excited states
metadata.reference: Pengmei, Shu & Levine, Beyond MD17: the reactive xxMD dataset, Sci. Data 11, 222 (2024).

title: Malonaldehyde Tautomer (xxMD-DFT)
subtitle: Intramolecular O-H proton shuttle between keto enol tautomers — the textbook example of low-barrier H-transfer.

metadata.method: Non-adiabatic excited-state MD (Tully surface hopping) at DFT (M06)
metadata.potential: DFT M06 with TDDFT excited states
metadata.reference: Pengmei, Shu & Levine, Beyond MD17: the reactive xxMD dataset, Sci. Data 11, 222 (2024).

title: Diarylethene Photoswitch (xxMD-DFT)
subtitle: Photochromic C-C ring-closure dithienylethene — actual bond formation captured by Tully surface hopping. Switches color, conductivity, geometry.

metadata.method: Non-adiabatic excited-state MD (Tully surface hopping) at DFT (M06)
metadata.potential: DFT M06 with TDDFT excited states
metadata.reference: Pengmei, Shu & Levine, Beyond MD17: the reactive xxMD dataset, Sci. Data 11, 222 (2024).

title: Aspirin in Water (rMD17-aq)
subtitle: QM/MM aqueous aspirin with CP2K partial charges per atom. Color by Q to see solvent-driven charge fluctuations on the carbonyl + carboxylate.

metadata.method: QM/MM AIMD (DFT QM region in TIP3P water)
metadata.reference: Hellström, Ceriotti & Riniker (rMD17-aq), QM/MM aqueous extension of rMD17 with CP2K partial charges (2023).

title: Uracil in Water (rMD17-aq)
subtitle: QM/MM aqueous uracil. Per-atom partial charges flicker as H-bond donors/acceptors couple to TIP3P bath.

metadata.method: QM/MM AIMD (DFT QM region in TIP3P water)
metadata.reference: Hellström, Ceriotti & Riniker (rMD17-aq), QM/MM aqueous extension of rMD17 with CP2K partial charges (2023).

title: Salicylic Acid in Water (rMD17-aq)
subtitle: QM/MM aqueous salicylic acid — intramolecular H-bond competes with bulk solvent; charge dynamics resolve which proton state dominates.

metadata.method: QM/MM AIMD (DFT QM region in TIP3P water)
metadata.reference: Hellström, Ceriotti & Riniker (rMD17-aq), QM/MM aqueous extension of rMD17 with CP2K partial charges (2023).
